text: Expose non-interactive, self-documenting commands that an External Orchestrator or direct owner invocation can discover and use safely. Evidence: direct — the owner requires Hermes to invoke a provider-neutral Tally CLI without private-store or transport coupling; workflow UC-LEDGER-006.
target: Every Ledger command provides versioned machine-readable schemas and structured outcomes, rejects incompatible contracts before mutation, and contains no mailbox, provider, recipient, schedule, rendering, or delivery semantics.
